title: My Village Pack
description: This mod allows you to explore a new villages in the dark forest and the swamp biomes.
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=p2zm8OXdFqA&ab_channel=Libliga

This mod allows you to explore a new villages in the dark forest and the swamp biomes. There are also 3 new villagers waiting for you in the dark grove village.
